languages.text: {n}Батошски наклоняет голову, как зверь перед прыжком, но голос его удивительно тих и спокоен.{/n} "Внизу, под поселением, — его склеп. Мы туда не ходим, не хотим тревожить память вашего предка. Если желаете навестить Вольного Торговца, милости просим. Вот только рядом с ним окопалась Погонщица, а значит идти туда — верная смерть".

traits.locale_text: {n}Батошски наклоняет голову, как зверь перед прыжком, но голос его удивительно тих и спокоен.{/n} "Внизу, под поселением, лежит его склеп. Мы туда не ходим, не хотим тревожить память вашего предка. Если желаете навестить Вольного Торговца, милости просим. Вот только рядом с ним окопалась Погонщица, а значит идти туда — верная смерть".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: {n}Batoshski tilts his head like a beast before a pounce, yet his voice is surprisingly low and calm.{/n} "Down below, beneath the outpost, lies his tomb. We don't go there, we don't want to disturb the memory of your ancestor. If you desire to visit the Rogue Trader, you are more than welcome. But the Drover has entrenched itself right beside it, which means going there is certain death."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски наклоняет голову, как зверь перед прыжком, но голос его удивительно тих и спокоен.{/n} "Внизу, под поселением, — его склеп. Мы туда не ходим, не хотим тревожить память вашего предка. Если желаете навестить Вольного Торговца, милости просим. Вот только рядом с ним окопалась Погонщица, а значит идти туда — верная смерть".

We don't go there, we don't want to disturb the memory of your ancestor. If you desire to visit the Rogue Trader, you are more than welcome. But the Drover has entrenched itself right beside him, which means going there is certain death."

{n}Batoshski chuckles under his breath, but he does not take his eyes off you for a second.{/n} "And what are you hoping to find? Old bones? His crypt is underneath the settlement — we haven't ventured there ourselves in centuries. His retinue, before they departed the world and left us to die, built a tomb. But that won't help you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Right next to it is where the Drover crawls out. Going there would be certain death."

However, the Drover has entrenched itself right beside him, which means going there is certain death."

languages.text: バトシュスキーは息を潜めて笑うが、一瞬も目を離さない。 「そして、あなたは一体何を望んでいるのですか？骨だけですか？彼の墓は村の下にありますが、我々は何世紀にも渡ってその場所には足を踏み入れたことがありません。彼の従者たちは、この世を去る前に、我々に死を突きつけ、墓を築きました。しかし、それはあなたのお役に立たないでしょう。そのすぐ隣は、ドルーバーが這い出す場所です。そこに行くことは、死を意味するでしょう」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski chuckles under his breath, but he does not take his eyes off you for a second.{/n} "And what are you hoping to find? Old bones? His crypt is underneath the settlement — we haven't ventured there ourselves in centuries. His retinue, before they departed the world and left us to die, built a tomb. But that won't help you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Right next to it is where the Drover crawls out. Going there would be certain death."

traits.locale_text: バトシュスキーは息を潜めて笑うが、一瞬も目を離さない。 「そして、あなたは一体何を望んでいるのですか？骨だけですか？彼の墓は村の下にありますが、我々は何世紀にも渡ってその場所には足を踏み入れたことがありません。彼の従者たちは、この世を去る前に、我々に死を突きつけ、墓を築きました。しかし、それはあなたのお役に立たないでしょう。そのすぐ隣は、ドルーバーが這い出す場所です。そこに行くことは、死を意味するでしょう。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski neigt seinen Kopf wie eine Bestie vor dem Sprung, aber seine Stimme ist überraschend tief und ruhig.{/n} "Dort unten, unter dem Außenposten, befindet sich sein Grab. Wir gehen nicht dorthin, um die Erinnerung an Euren Ahnherren nicht zu stören. Wollt Ihr den Freihändler besuchen, nur zu. Allerdings hat sich der Treiber neben ihm eingegraben. Zu ihm zu gehen, bedeutet also den sicheren Tod."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski tilts his head like a beast before a pounce, yet his voice is surprisingly low and calm.{/n} "Down below, beneath the outpost, lies his tomb. We don't go there, we don't want to disturb the memory of your ancestor. If you desire to visit the Rogue Trader, you are more than welcome. But the Drover has entrenched itself right beside it, which means going there is certain death."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski baisse brusquement la tête comme un fauve prêt à bondir, mais sa voix demeure étonnamment basse et sereine.{/n} « Sa tombe se trouve sous terre, dans les profondeurs de l'avant-poste. Nous n'y allons jamais, de crainte de troubler la mémoire de votre ancêtre, mais si vous désirez lui rendre visite, vous êtes plus que {mf|bienvenu|bienvenue}. Cependant, le Chasseur s'est retranché juste à côté, ce qui signifie qu'une mort certaine vous y attend. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski tilts his head like a beast before a pounce, yet his voice is surprisingly low and calm.{/n} "Down below, beneath the outpost, lies his tomb. We don't go there, we don't want to disturb the memory of your ancestor. If you desire to visit the Rogue Trader, you are more than welcome. But the Drover has entrenched itself right beside it, which means going there is certain death."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski inclina la cabeza como una bestia a punto de abalanzarse, pero su voz es sorprendentemente tranquila.{/n} «Muy por debajo del puesto avanzado está su tumba. No frecuentamos el lugar, ya que no queremos perturbar el descanso de su antepasado. Si quiere visitar al Comerciante Independiente, es libre de hacerlo, pero en estos momentos el Pastor se ha atrincherado allí, por lo que bajar sería una muerte segura».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski tilts his head like a beast before a pounce, yet his voice is surprisingly low and calm.{/n} "Down below, beneath the outpost, lies his tomb. languages.text: {n}Batoshski, saldırmaya hazırlanan bir yaratık gibi başını eğiyor. Sesiyle şaşırtıcı derecede alçak ve sakin çıkıyor.{/n} "Aşağıda, ileri karakolun altında mezarı yatıyor. Oraya gitmeyiz. Atanızın anısını rahatsız etmek istemeyiz. Hür Tacir'i ziyaret etmek isterseniz kimse bundan rahatsızlık duymaz. Ancak Çoban hemen mezarının yanına yerleşti, yani oraya gitmeye kalkarsanız ölümünüz kesin olacaktır."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski tilts his head like a beast before a pounce, yet his voice is surprisingly low and calm.{/n} "Down below, beneath the outpost, lies his tomb. We don't go there, we don't want to disturb the memory of your ancestor. If you desire to visit the Rogue Trader, you are more than welcome. But the Drover has entrenched itself right beside it, which means going there is certain death."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基微微歪头，像捕食前的野兽，可声音却出奇地低沉平静。{/n}“在下面，前哨的地下，有他的墓穴。我们不会去那里，不想惊扰您先祖的安息。如果您想拜访那位行商浪人，我们万分欢迎。但是，拒生花就在他旁边盘踞，所以去那里必死无疑。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski tilts his head like a beast before a pounce, yet his voice is surprisingly low and calm.{/n} "Down below, beneath the outpost, lies his tomb. But the Drover has entrenched itself right beside it, which means going there is certain death."
